name: image-generation-workbench
description: 无第三方依赖的图片生成工作台

scripts.check: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'),path=require('node:path'),cp=require('node:child_process');const roots=['server.js','workspace-shell.js','lib','routes','app','config.example.js'];const files=[];function walk(p){const s=fs.statSync(p);if(s.isDirectory()){for(const n of fs.readdirSync(p))walk(path.join(p,n));}else if(p.endsWith('.js'))files.push(p);}for(const p of roots)walk(path.resolve(p));for(const f of files){const r=cp.spawnSync(process.execPath,['--check',f],{stdio:'inherit'});if(r.status!==0)process.exit(r.status??1);}console.log('Checked '+files.length+' JavaScript files.');"
